What are you looking for?

Search Reddit for posts or discover people in any community, instantly.

Powered by Apify's reliable infrastructure for quick and efficient Reddit data extraction.

Automatic caching system prevents duplicate requests and improves response times.

Real-time Results

Choose your plan

7 days free trial. No credit card required.

FREE

$0/ month
  • 50 searches/month
  • Reddit posts only
  • Basic AI analysis (intent classification, AI summary)
  • Filters: keyword, subreddit, date range
  • Export: CSV and JSON
  • User profiling
  • Other platforms
MOST POPULAR

PLUS

$10/ month
  • 200 searches/month
  • Reddit posts + comments
  • AI summaries + pain point detection
  • Filters: advanced sorting, upvote threshold, flair filter
  • Export: CSV, JSON, Excel
  • User profiling
  • Other platforms coming soon

PRO

$25/ month
  • 400 searches/month
  • 200 results per search
  • Reddit + all future platforms (Discord, Twitter etc.)
  • Deep AI insights: sentiment, lead scoring, intent detection
  • Filters: all above + scheduled/automated runs
  • Export: all formats + bulk
  • User profiling + bulk export
No card required
Your data is safe
